title: Will TMC’s symbolic ‘Jora Ghas Phul’ stay with Mamata Banerjee or be claimed by rebels amid power battle?
description: The TMC faces deepening internal discord, prompting a shift of its Delhi office and resignations from 19 MPs. The rebel faction demands recognition as the 'real TMC' parliamentary group, leading to questions about the party's unity and the future of its election symbol.
